cut_carrot.audio_cues: [00:04 - 00:41] The user begins peeling a carrot over a small white bowl, producing a series of sharp, rhythmic scraping sounds. [00:47 - 01:13] The user picks up a large chef's knife and starts slicing the carrot on a white cutting board. [01:43 - 01:49] The chopping stops temporarily, replaced by the faint rustling and sliding sounds of carrot strips being rearranged and aligned on the cutting board by the user's hand. [01:49 - 02:12] Another sequence of steady, rhythmic chopping begins, targeting the remaining sections of the carrot. [02:12 - 02:30] The sound of the knife blade scraping across the board is heard as the user gathers the strips into a pile, followed by a few isolated, heavier "thuds" as the last few large chunks are halved. [02:30 - 03:04] A final, sustained sequence of fast-paced chopping occurs as the user finely juliennes the carrot strips. audio_understanding.caption: [00:04 - 00:41] The user begins peeling a carrot over a small white bowl, producing a series of sharp, rhythmic scraping sounds. Each downward stroke of the peeler against the carrot's skin creates a distinct rasping noise that lasts about a second, confirming the physical removal of the peel. [00:41 - 00:46] As the peeling concludes, a light metallic click is heard when the user places the peeler on the counter, followed by a soft sliding sound and a muffled thud as the bowl containing the peels is moved to the side. [00:47 - 01:13] The user picks up a large chef's knife and starts slicing the carrot on a white cutting board. The audio consists of repetitive, percussive "thwack" sounds as the blade cuts through the vegetable and strikes the board, indicating a forceful and steady slicing motion. [01:13 - 01:18] A short break in the chopping is filled with a soft scraping sound as the user uses the knife blade to gather the sliced carrot pieces together on the plastic surface. [01:18 - 01:43] Rapid, rhythmic chopping sounds resume as the user continues to slice the carrot into thinner strips. The sharp, nearby impacts of the knife against the board are consistent in volume and tempo, visually guided by the user's controlled hand movements. [01:43 - 01:49] The chopping stops temporarily, replaced by the faint rustling and sliding sounds of carrot strips being rearranged and aligned on the cutting board by the user's hand. [01:49 - 02:12] Another sequence of steady, rhythmic chopping begins, targeting the remaining sections of the carrot. The volume of the knife strikes remains consistent, reflecting the uniform force applied to the cutting board. [02:12 - 02:30] The sound of the knife blade scraping across the board is heard as the user gathers the strips into a pile, followed by a few isolated, heavier "thuds" as the last few large chunks are halved. [02:30 - 03:04] A final, sustained sequence of fast-paced chopping occurs as the user finely juliennes the carrot strips. The tempo of the "thwack-thwack-thwack" sounds increases, ending with a final metallic clatter as the user sets the knife down on the countertop.
audio_understanding.question: What sound is described?
audio_understanding.answer: knife blade scraping across the board is heard

selected_reliable_qas.caption: 00:13 - 00:14 A sharp metallic click occurs as the camera wearer reaches out and pulls the silver door handle to open the exit door of the study room. 00:15 - 00:18 A series of soft rustling sounds and muffled thuds are heard as the person moves their body and walks through the doorway into the hallway. 00:22 - 00:23 A solid, medium-volume thud resonates as the user closes the white door behind them, signaling they have completely left the previous room. 00:24 - 00:27 Rhythmic, soft thumping sounds of footsteps on the wooden-patterned floor are heard as the user walks towards the restroom door. 00:29 - 00:30 A mechanical click of a handle is followed immediately by a louder thud as the user pushes open the door to the restroom area. 00:34 - 00:36 A sharp click followed by a heavy thud occurs as the user pulls the restroom door shut from the inside to secure privacy. 00:39 - 00:42 Three distinct plastic clicking sounds are heard as the user repeatedly presses the top of the white and pink soap dispenser mounted on the wall. 00:43 - 00:45 A sudden, steady rushing sound of water begins as the user activates the faucet to wet their hands. 00:47 - 01:02 Continuous soft, squelching and rubbing sounds are produced as the user thoroughly lathers soap between their palms, visible in the mirror. 01:02 - 01:05 The rushing sound of the faucet intensifies briefly as the water is triggered again, signaling the start of the rinsing process. 01:05 - 01:21 Intermittent splashing and wet rubbing sounds occur as the user moves their hands under the water stream to rinse off the soap. 01:22 - 01:24 A brief, fast rustling sound is heard as the user vigorously shakes excess water from their hands into the sink basin. 01:24 - 01:29 Sharp, papery rustling sounds are heard as the user pulls a paper towel from the dispenser and rubs it against their hands to dry them. 01:32 - 01:34 A dry, crunching sound of paper is heard as the user crumples the used towel before discarding it into the nearby bin. 01:35 - 01:37 A metallic click of the door handle occurs as the user grasps it and pulls to open the restroom door and exit. 01:38 - 01:43 A sequence of footsteps is followed by a loud, echoing bang as the restroom door slams shut automatically behind the departing user. 01:47 - 01:50 A short electronic beep is followed by a mechanical clicking sound as the user taps an ID card against the electronic lock and pulls the door open. 01:55 - 01:58 A final, solid thud is heard as the user enters the study room and pulls the door shut to return to their workspace. 01:59 - 02:03 Soft thuds and rustling sounds occur as the person approaches the desk and prepares to sit back down at the computer.

audio_understanding.caption: 00:13 - 00:14 A sharp metallic click occurs as the camera wearer reaches out and pulls the silver door handle to open the exit door of the study room. 00:15 - 00:18 A series of soft rustling sounds and muffled thuds are heard as the person moves their body and walks through the doorway into the hallway. 00:22 - 00:23 A solid, medium-volume thud resonates as the user closes the white door behind them, signaling they have completely left the previous room. 00:24 - 00:27 Rhythmic, soft thumping sounds of footsteps on the wooden-patterned floor are heard as the user walks towards the restroom door. 00:29 - 00:30 A mechanical click of a handle is followed immediately by a louder thud as the user pushes open the door to the restroom area. 00:34 - 00:36 A sharp click followed by a heavy thud occurs as the user pulls the restroom door shut from the inside to secure privacy. 00:39 - 00:42 Three distinct plastic clicking sounds are heard as the user repeatedly presses the top of the white and pink soap dispenser mounted on the wall. 00:43 - 00:45 A sudden, steady rushing sound of water begins as the user activates the faucet to wet their hands. 00:47 - 01:02 Continuous soft, squelching and rubbing sounds are produced as the user thoroughly lathers soap between their palms, visible in the mirror. 01:02 - 01:05 The rushing sound of the faucet intensifies briefly as the water is triggered again, signaling the start of the rinsing process. 01:05 - 01:21 Intermittent splashing and wet rubbing sounds occur as the user moves their hands under the water stream to rinse off the soap. 01:22 - 01:24 A brief, fast rustling sound is heard as the user vigorously shakes excess water from their hands into the sink basin. 01:24 - 01:29 Sharp, papery rustling sounds are heard as the user pulls a paper towel from the dispenser and rubs it against their hands to dry them. 01:32 - 01:34 A dry, crunching sound of paper is heard as the user crumples the used towel before discarding it into the nearby bin. 01:35 - 01:37 A metallic click of the door handle occurs as the user grasps it and pulls to open the restroom door and exit. 01:38 - 01:43 A sequence of footsteps is followed by a loud, echoing bang as the restroom door slams shut automatically behind the departing user. 01:47 - 01:50 A short electronic beep is followed by a mechanical clicking sound as the user taps an ID card against the electronic lock and pulls the door open. 01:55 - 01:58 A final, solid thud is heard as the user enters the study room and pulls the door shut to return to their workspace. 01:59 - 02:03 Soft thuds and rustling sounds occur as the person approaches the desk and prepares to sit back down at the computer.
